changes: ✨ Add Booking Screen simplified: Date & Client info are now smoothly combined on the first screen.
📊 Dashboard now shows live monthly booking trends compared to the previous month.
🎨 Polished UI colors: Removed unexpected grey backgrounds in Dashboard and Account screens for a cleaner look.
🚀 Fixed app splash screen logo clipping on Android 12+ devices.
📱 App Launcher icon updated to ensure consistency.
✨ Combined client details and event selection into a single simplified screen.
📍 Added a mandatory 'Place' field under client details to capture location info.
🎨 Redesigned confirm booking screen into sleek 2-column glass-morphism cards.
💬 Directly launch WhatsApp after booking confirmation without separate popups.
✨ Fully integrated custom full-color icons (Wedding, Nikkah, Engagement, Bride, Groom, Ring).
📱 Optimized spacing and layouts across dialogs to prevent scrolling on standard screens.
✨ Never miss an alert! Notifications are now safely saved even after you close the app.
🚀 Tap and go: Clicking a notification now takes you directly to the right screen.
🎨 Enjoy a smoother, visually pleasing animation when pulling to refresh the dashboard.
✨ Upgraded the bottom menu with a fresh new interactive bounce effect.
🛠️ Improved reliability and fixed minor bugs when checking for new app updates.
Added a dedicated 'Updates & Changelog' screen.
Integrated custom fonts including Gilroy globally.
In-app update checks now fetch directly from GitHub Releases API.
Initial release of the Event Desk Android application.
